scenes.text: Introduction to Docker: Understanding its core purpose and the problem it solves by enabling applications to run in containers consistently across different environments.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A(Docker) -->|Containerization| B(Apps); B --> C(Consistent Environments);

scenes.text: Docker Architecture: Explore the architecture of Docker, which includes the Docker client, the Docker daemon, and Docker registries.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TB; A(Docker Client) --> B(Docker Daemon); B --> C(Docker Engine); C --> D(Docker Registries);

scenes.text: Understanding Docker Images: Learn how Docker images are read-only templates that form the base of containers.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A(Docker Images) --> B(Read-Only Templates); B --> C(Container Base);

scenes.text: Docker Containers: Delve into the structure of Docker containers that house applications and their dependencies.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A(Docker Containers) --> B(Applications); B --> C(Dependencies);

scenes.text: Working with Docker Hub: Explore Docker Hub, the cloud-based repository where Docker images are stored and shared.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A(Docker Hub) --> B(Cloud Repository); B --> C(Image Storage); C --> D(Image Sharing);

scenes.text: Creating Your Own Docker Images: Steps and best practices for creating custom Docker images.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A(Custom Docker Images) --> B(Building Process); B --> C(Best Practices);

scenes.text: Docker Networking: Learn how Docker allows containers to communicate with each other and external networks.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TB; A(Docker Networking) --> B(Container Communication); B --> C(External Networks);

scenes.text: Data Management in Docker: Discuss persistent storage and how Docker volumes are used for data management inside containers.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A(Docker Volumes) --> B(Persistent Storage); B --> C(Data Management);

scenes.text: Docker Security: An overview of Docker's security features and practices to safeguard applications.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A(Docker Security) --> B(Security Features); B --> C(Practices); C --> D(Safeguard Applications);

scenes.text: Advanced Docker Concepts: Brief on scaling applications using Docker Swarm and Kubernetes for orchestration.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A(Scaling Applications) --> B(Docker Swarm); B & C(Kubernetes);
